---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for SQL Agent LLMOps
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case
Explain the use case and why this feature would be valuable. What problem does it solve?

Example scenarios:
- As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]
- In [situation], it would be helpful to [action]

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this feature should work. Include:
- New API or interface changes
- Configuration options
- Integration with existing components

## Example Usage
```python
# Show how users would interact with this feature
from sql_agent import Agent

agent = Agent()
result = agent.new_feature(param1="value")
```

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered alternative approaches? List them here.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Implementation Notes
If you have thoughts on how to implement this:
- Required changes to existing code
- New dependencies (if any)
- Estimated effort level (small/medium/large)
- Potential breaking changes

## Related Issues
Link to any related issues or discussions.
